description_long: This is a clear plastic cup filled with a light brown, milky liquid, characteristic of classic bubble tea. The bottom of the cup contains a cluster of dark, spherical tapioca pearls, which are distinctly visible through the transparent sides. A domed, transparent plastic lid covers the top, featuring a central opening through which a wide, straight purple straw is inserted. The cup has no visible branding, logos, or printed designs, giving it a plain and generic appearance. The surface of the cup and lid is smooth and glossy, reflecting light subtly. The overall look is clean and modern, typical of beverages served in urban cafes or bubble tea shops.
description: A transparent plastic cup of light brown bubble tea with visible dark tapioca pearls, topped with a domed lid and a wide purple straw. The cup is unbranded and has a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the purple straw, domed lid, and a clear view of the tapioca pearls clustered at the bottom.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the straw still centered, showing a different arrangement of pearls and the cup's smooth, unbranded surface.
description_view_2: Another angled view highlighting the transparency of the cup and the distribution of pearls, with the straw remaining prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view with the straw and lid visible, and a clear look at the back side of the cup and pearls.
attribute_straw_type: plastic, wide, straight, purple, no distinctive features
attribute_cup_lid_style: domed, transparent plastic lid with central straw slot
